name: review-final-verify
default_program:
[stages: review>audit |
 scope: diff |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{tests,security},deterministic-output |
 lens: contract-evidence-verifier |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: VERIFY_TARGETS
required_inputs.description: Files, docs, outputs, or artifacts to validate.

required_inputs.name: DONE_CRITERIA
required_inputs.description: Sections, schemas, or invariants that must hold.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Tests, logs, or prior review outputs.

outputs.name: FINAL_VERIFICATION_STATUS
outputs.description: Pass, blocked, or inconclusive final status.
